Natural preservative found in citrus fruits. Safe for general consumption.

Helps blend oil and water. Non-GMO alternative to soy lecithin.

Seaweed-derived thickener. Some studies link degraded form to digestive inflammation.

Contains industrial trans fats. Banned or restricted in many countries.

Used in processed meats. Can form nitrosamines when heated to high temperatures.

Starch-derived carbohydrate. High glycemic index.

Natural gum from acacia tree. Used as stabilizer and binder.

Whole grain wheat flour. Higher fiber and better nutritional profile than maida.

Plant-derived oil. Composition varies by source.

High in linoleic acid. Better fatty acid profile than palm oil.

Water with dissolved CO2. Safe.

Mixture of various spices. Generally safe.

Common leavening agent. Generally safe.
